member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles user registration, login, and the current authenticated user profile.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Register(SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new end user account and returns a bearer token for immediate use.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT bearer token with role claims.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.AuthController.GetCurrentUser(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController
member.summary: Manages ticket creation, ticket workflows, assignment, and discussion.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController.GetTickets(SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of tickets visible to the current user.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController.GetTicket(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns ticket details, including comments and audit history, if the current user has access.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController.CreateTicket(SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.CreateTicketRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new helpdesk ticket for the current user.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController.UpdateTicket(System.Guid,SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates editable ticket fields such as title, description, and priority.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController.UpdateTicketStatus(System.Guid,SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketStatusRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates a ticket's workflow status when the requested transition is allowed.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController.UpdateTicketAssignee(System.Guid,SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.AssignTicketRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assigns a ticket to an agent.

member.name: M:SecureHelpdesk.Api.Controllers.TicketsController.AddComment(System.Guid,SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.AddCommentRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a comment to a ticket visible to the current user.
